title: messaging — data retention windows
description: Message retention is the trickiest in the codebase. Safeguarding compliance mandates 7yr retention of flagged messages; GDPR mandates deletion on user request; K-12 tenants require zero retention post-graduation. Multi-policy resolution defers to the STRICTEST setting.

policies.description: Conversation shell retained 2 years post-last-message. Purged conversations retain member list + message count.
Standard messages: hot 1yr, warm 2yr, purge. Flagged messages retained 7yr (audit compliance).
Safeguarding-flagged messages retained indefinitely for compliance audit.
S3 objects purged with parent message. Safeguarding-flagged attachments retained 7yr like their messages.

gdpr_deletion: On user account deletion, own messages replaced with '[Message deleted]' tombstone. Safeguarding-flagged messages retain full body under legal-hold exception (documented in compliance module).
